name: Feathermaster
ability: Each day, publicly choose a player: if either of you die tonight, an alive Minion dies instead, if possible.

name: Donkey Wrangler
ability: If you are nominated, the demon must be executed today, or your team loses. [Your token is a square]

name: Bully
ability: Any players who vote differently to you might die at any time.

name: Prisoner
ability: You may not vote. You know 1 not-in-play character. If most players choose to free you, become that character & alignment.

name: Tramp
ability: If there are any votes to execute you, you might be executed immediately

name: Golden Child
ability: The 1st player to nominate you, turns evil that night, even if you are dead. If it's you, your team loses.

name: Daredevil
ability: If you are not mad as an in-play Townsfolk, a Townsfolk might die, even if you are dead.

name: Casanova
ability: Each night, choose a living player (not yourself): if they are executed & they are good, your team loses.

name: Charalatan
ability: The 1st time a player dies during the day, you become their alignment from tonight onwards.

name: Troll
ability: Each night, choose your alignment. On the final night even if you are dead, 1 player learns the Troll is in play.
